name: Rosie's Peanut Butter Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Butter or margarine, cut up
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, mix the peanut butter and powdered sugar until crumbly. Set aside.
2. For the filling, in a medium or large saucepan, combine the sugar and cornstarch. Add milk all at once. Cook and stir until bubbly. Continue cooking for 2 more minutes.
3. Remove from heat and gradually stir about 1 cup of the hot mixture into the eggs. Return all to the saucepan.
4. Cook on low heat until nearly bubbly, but do not boil. Stir the mixture for an additional 2 minutes.
5. Add the butter or margarine and vanilla. Stir well.
6. Sprinkle half of the peanut butter mixture over the baked crust. Mound the filling on top. Cover; chill for 1 hour.
7. In a mixing bowl, beat the whipping cream until stiff peaks form (tips stand straight). Spread whipped cream over pie. Sprinkle with remaining peanut butter mixture. Chill at least 2 hours before serving.
8. Store leftovers in the refrigerator. Makes 8 servings.
